name: refactor-chain
description: A self-diagnosing, self-healing fix-it pipeline: one door detects what a codebase needs (tidy / modernize / fix a bug / improve UI), routes to the right lane of native refactor-* skills, proves behavior is preserved at every step, reviews before shipping, and explains itself in plain language.

plugins.name: refactor-chain
plugins.description: Self-diagnosing, self-healing refactor/modernize/fix pipeline — 56 skills across backend/web/ui/code/debug lanes plus diagnose/verify/review/ship/improve phases and a discipline pack. Universal language registry, principle-driven engine, guidelines gate. Plain-language, ADHD-friendly, behavior-preserving.
